textByHash.04dd14ddbcb3817edb80148c6088f2e23ed7ba4e: Your guess is as good as ours.
textByHash.0a6a6c48e95aabd1f598fbe8aad5c7b82b8b9b06: Let's put you back in your cage where you belong...
textByHash.0eb99ad1f7e1fa31451b0e24b3d77755592c9dbc: Well, don't worry. We'll have you out of there shortly.
textByHash.172b2c45b44d68c5ff1cac49cf5a91389cefb0ae: It's entirely necessary: just take a look at the monkeys. They've been multiplying out of control!
textByHash.25411d716d7424746d28d0c5d0f2b04fc28d0476: I must be imagining things ... monkeys can't talk.
textByHash.2840319ae2d97fb7d06827f8246d1e916ff2358a: Every time we turn our backs another one of them tries to break free. It's almost as if they're plotting to escape!
textByHash.38b3f597590a6948161b63146eab207c59b4fd87: I'm sorry, I don't think I'm allowed to do that. I've just been ordered to not let any monkeys escape.
textByHash.55eb3f1011bdee1e5114b9f57f80ac0008db02c7: I don't know what kind of monkey you think you are, but you're not getting anywhere near my monkeys!
textByHash.6a8124d9008fff0e1165e5d196222f779e070989: We just don't know. Perhaps it's the weather. Perhaps it's something in the food. Perhaps it's just that time of year.
textByHash.84bd33108d087d66e456251214b0c5bdecc93ea4: I ... er ... used to dream to be a Monkey Minder when I was young boy...
textByHash.8f7f3b07d066e1ae3381131c408977a3fe2b19ea: Why do you monkeys keep trying to escape? Good thing I've caught you before you got away, you little scoundrel.
textByHash.b7d1a7261d8e561c99e987cd200c621410c2dde0: Stranger things have happened in Ardougne.
textByHash.c2a6163896b92b3bd271400cc2c34e3d5b7edf2c: We're going to post enough men here to be able to contain the monkeys in case they manage to escape.
textByHash.cdf75ad3df9c212926321f950dfb417e871cfaf5: Er, look, stop wasting my time.
textByHash.d81fbb721f9b9349033e9e4dbafa84dabb77ef59: My word - what are you doing in there?
textByHash.d89383a4b2e2a31d13d86bc92c4350490b4cc78c: Leave me alone now. Some of us have work to do.
textByHash.dab353b3c9c32b51fedfae0e0dc7d2bcdf1d4652: Yes, you wouldn't have. We have newly been posted here.
